_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: We observed a significant additive effect with the combination as compared to the single agents at 100nM abemaciclib and 250nM LY3214996, indicated by reduced colony formation
resourceName: Nf1-/- dorsal root ganglia neurosphere cells
details: Significant additive effect with combination at 100nM abemaciclib and 250nM LY3214996, indicated by reduced colony formation
